title: Implement a UART-style protocol parser with byte stuffing and CRC
instruction: Complete the protocol parser in protocol.c. Implement: (1) crc16_ccitt for CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE calculation, (2) protocol_encode to frame a payload with start marker, length, escaped payload, CRC, and end marker, (3) protocol_decode to parse a framed packet with byte unstuffing and CRC verification, (4) protocol_init to initialize a stream parser state machine. Handle edge cases: buffer overflow, malformed packets, CRC errors, zero-length payloads, escape byte at boundaries.
difficulty_rationale: State-machine protocol implementation combining framing, escaping, CRC, malformed input, and boundary safety.
